note: The specmap orphan ratchet (PLAYBOOK #phase2, flipped 2026-06-10; expanded Phase 6 same day). A crate NOT listed in `exempt` is gated. Remaining exemptions and why: vibe-cli (half its modules have no PROP home until VIBEVM-SPEC.md is scanned/unit-ified — it lives at the repo root, outside spec/**), vibe-mcp (M1.7 surface, no module PROP), vibe-graph + vibe-llm (stub crates), vibe-wire (generated code — the JTD schema is the taggable unit), xtask (internal tooling binary), specmark + specmark-grammar (the tag bootstrap pair cannot depend on specmark to carry scope! markers — tagging them is a scanner-level feature, not a macro one).
